form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; disqualified at Meslay-du-Maine on March 17 over 2875m. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 6.7m (25m) at Laval beating King Sun Draliam in 6yo gelding handicap on February 4 at $6.30. Will give a good account.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 5th (25m) over 2800m at Rambouillet, beaten 23m by Kelowna Legend in 6yo handicap on March 29 at $5. The run prior 6th over 2875m at Meslay-du-Maine beaten 19m by Kelas in 6yo gelding race on March 17 at $10. Finds a nice race to rediscover his best form.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 8th (25m) over 2825m at Le Crois?-Laroche, beaten 36m by Koman in 6-7yo gelding handicap on March 23 at $2.80. The start before disqualified at Chartres on March 15 over 2825m. Good enough to make amends in this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start a big 8.1m win as favourite at Mauquenchy beating Kalmia Boss in 6-7yo handicap on March 16 at $2.10. No surprise if he made it two in a row.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd over 2450m at Caen beaten 2.7m by Joyeux Nonna in 7yo handicap on March 25 at $2.90. Two runs back 4th over 2450m at Caen beaten 15m by Jazerane in 6-7yo mare race on March 5 at $11. Likely to struggle.

form.formComment: Second-up here following a spell. Solid effort when 2nd over 2850m at Maure-de-Bretagne beaten 6.7m by Ilaria Kily in 7-11yo handicap on March 24 at $20. Strips fitter and can make his presence felt.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she 7th over 2175m at Vincennes, beaten 11m by Jacinthe Du Boiron in 7yo mare race on January 22 at $27. Capable of taking this out while fresh.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second behind Ick Du Vivier at Marseille Vivaux over 2650m in a 7-10yo amateur drivers handicap on February 13 at $3.20. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.6m finishing third behind Jouvence at Feurs over 2850m in a 7-11yo amateur drivers handicap on March 8. Racing in great heart and is a leading contender.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th (25m) over 2625m at Cherbourg beaten 30m by Know Ever in 6yo handicap on April 6 at $130. Before that 6th (25m) over 2450m at Caen beaten 24m by Kabri in 6yo handicap on March 25 at $149. Not a genuine contender.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 1.4m at Vincennes beating Klasse De Bruzeau in 6-8yo mare race on March 21 at $30. Two runs back disqualified at Enghien on March 10 over 2875m. Better off investing elsewhere.

form.formComment: Solid run when beaten by 1.4m finishing second behind Kong D'hollow at Reims over 2550m in a 6-11yo gelding race on March 19 at $9.50.
